chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No. D- 3483 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 18086/23 (U/A) 2. For order on CMA No. 18087/23 3. For order as to maintainability of petition. 18.08.2023 Mr. Munir Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. ********* 1. Granted. 2-3. Counsel for the Petitioner submits that this petition has become infructuous as the goods have already been auctioned. However, through application at Serial No.2, the Petitioner seeks return of original documents annexed with petition i.e. Annexure “B” available at Page-23 and Annexure “G” available at page-59. On perusal of the record, his request appears to be justified. Accordingly, application at Serial No.2 is allowed. Office is directed to release original documents i.e. Annexures “B” & “G” to the Petitioner after retaining copies. Petition stands dismissed as infructuous along pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
